name: OptiFabric Ultra
description: Dramatically boost your FPS and render distance with advanced shader support and GPU optimizations built for modern hardware.

name: Sodium Extended
description: A complete rewrite of the Minecraft renderer with aggressive batching, chunk culling, and memory allocation improvements.

name: InvManager Pro
description: Smart inventory sorting, auto-refill, item grouping, and a fully customizable HUD overlay for power users.

name: MiniHUD Forge
description: Display F3-style info overlays, light levels, mob spawning regions, structure bounding boxes, and custom alerts.

name: WorldGuard+
description: Advanced region-based protection with per-player permissions, anti-grief tools, and real-time event monitoring.

name: CarpetMod Reborn
description: The definitive technical Minecraft toolkit: tick control, spawn spheres, auto-craft, and advanced debugging for redstone engineers.
